data.answer: 核心创新是提出完全基于注意力机制的 Transformer 架构。该架构取消了循环神经网络和卷积神经网络，通过多头自注意力并行处理序列，提高了训练效率和长距离依赖建模能力。

citations.quote: The paper proposes a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms.
The Transformer follows an encoder-decoder structure using stacked self-attention and point-wise fully connected layers.
